R0219.title: Metaverse Content Moderation Challenge
R0219.definition: 3D virtual content and real-time voice interactions are difficult to moderate automatically, increasing risk of spreading violating content (pornography, violence, fraud, etc.).

references.title: Content security baseline for an integrated physical-digital metaverse

R0219.description: 3D virtual content and real-time voice interactions are difficult to moderate automatically, increasing risk of spreading violating content (pornography, violence, fraud, etc.).
R0219.influence: May cause business abuse, data exposure, financial loss, compliance impact, or supply-chain propagation.
